analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet informs that EU citizens living in the UK must apply for settled status and promotes a Facebook Q&A with an immigration lawyer for senior EU citizens. It is informational about UK immigration requirements post-Brexit and provides practical help via a legal Q&A. Evaluation of narratives: EU1 (EU as a successful story): Not promoted; no mention of EU history, success, or lessons learned. EU2 (EU is united): Not addressed; no reference to EU unity or solidarity. EU3 (EU is useful for its citizens): Not supported; the assistance offered is from an NGO/lawyer about UK policy, not an EU policy improving citizens’ lives within the EU. EU4 (EU as avant-garde actor): Not relevant; no policy leadership claims. EU5 (EU as champion of fair causes): Not claimed; no rights leadership framing. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world): Not relevant; no global cooperation/peace claims. Conclusion: The tweet does not promote any listed EU narratives.
